mapper.sql: m.MENU_ID AS "menuId", m.MENU_NAME AS "menuName", m.MENU_URL AS "menuUrl", m.MENU_IMAGE AS "menuImage", m.SORT_ORDER AS "sortOrder", m.DISPLAY_YN AS "displayYn", m.USE_YN AS "useYn", m.PRIOR_MENU_ID AS "priorMenuId", m.WEB_APP_ID AS "webAppId", m.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS "lastUpdateDtime", m.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS "lastUpdateUserId"

m.MENU_ID AS "menuId", m.MENU_NAME AS "menuName", m.MENU_URL AS "menuUrl", m.MENU_IMAGE AS "menuImage", m.SORT_ORDER AS "sortOrder", m.DISPLAY_YN AS "displayYn", m.USE_YN AS "useYn", m.PRIOR_MENU_ID AS "priorMenuId", m.WEB_APP_ID AS "webAppId", m.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS "lastUpdateDtime", m.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS "lastUpdateUserId", CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM FWK_MENU c WHERE c.PRIOR_MENU_ID = m.MENU_ID AND c.MENU_ID != m.MENU_ID ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "hasChildren"
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_MENU WHERE MENU_ID = #{menuId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_MENU WHERE MENU_NAME = #{menuName}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_MENU WHERE PRIOR_MENU_ID = #{priorMenuId} AND MENU_ID != #{menuId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_MENU ( MENU_ID, MENU_NAME, MENU_URL, MENU_IMAGE, SORT_ORDER, DISPLAY_YN, USE_YN, PRIOR_MENU_ID, WEB_APP_ID, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{dto.menuId}, #{dto.menuName}, #{dto.menuUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.menuImage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.sortOrder, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{dto.displayYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.useYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.priorMenuId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.webAppId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now}, #{currentUserId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE FWK_MENU SET MENU_NAME = #{dto.menuName}, MENU_URL = #{dto.menuUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MENU_IMAGE = #{dto.menuImage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SORT_ORDER = #{dto.sortOrder, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, DISPLAY_YN = #{dto.displayYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USE_YN = #{dto.useYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PRIOR_MENU_ID = #{dto.priorMenuId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WEB_APP_ID = #{dto.webAppId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME = #{now}, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID = #{currentUserId} WHERE MENU_ID = #{menuId}
mapper.select:
SELECT
WHERE m.USE_YN = 'Y' AND m.DISPLAY_YN = 'Y' AND (m.MENU_URL IS NULL OR m.MENU_URL NOT IN ('NaN', 'NAN'))

SELECT
ORDER BY
UPPER(m.MENU_ID) UPPER(m.MENU_NAME) UPPER(m.MENU_URL) m.SORT_ORDER, m.MENU_ID
DESC ASC
ORDER BY m.SORT_ORDER, m.MENU_ID

SELECT m.MENU_ID AS "menuId", m.MENU_NAME AS "menuName", m.MENU_URL AS "menuUrl", m.MENU_IMAGE AS "menuImage", m.SORT_ORDER AS "sortOrder", m.DISPLAY_YN AS "displayYn", m.USE_YN AS "useYn", m.PRIOR_MENU_ID AS "priorMenuId", m.WEB_APP_ID AS "webAppId", m.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS "lastUpdateDtime", m.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS "lastUpdateUserId" FROM FWK_MENU m WHERE m.USE_YN = 'Y' AND m.DISPLAY_YN = 'Y' START WITH m.PRIOR_MENU_ID IS NULL CONNECT BY PRIOR m.MENU_ID = m.PRIOR_MENU_ID ORDER SIBLINGS BY m.SORT_ORDER, m.MENU_ID
